title: Endless Music
description: Removes the long pauses between background music.
body:
[![ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/X8X310LPEV)
Removes the long pauses between background music by letting you configure the delay ( in seconds ) between each track ! this is what the config screen looks like, you can input the amount of seconds between each track and it will apply ! ![an image showing the configuration screen of this mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8046d9c3b7d53cc9675218b41572e49fa3f32247.jpeg)
